<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. (Created .github/copilot-instructions.md.)

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (Use /frontend + /backend; Next.js TypeScript + Tailwind; LLM provider: Gemini.)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (Next.js frontend scaffolded; backend and supabase folders created.)

- [x] Customize the Project (Built chat UI, Supabase auth client, FastAPI memory pipeline, and schema assets.)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (No extensions required.)

- [x] Compile the Project (Next.js build completed successfully.)

- [x] Create and Run Task (No task required for this setup.)

- [x] Launch the Project (Frontend and backend dev servers started.)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README.md updated; HTML comments removed.)

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
